delegations.summary: Reported the stale pre-fix payload shape, needs-auth readiness gap, cross-origin target risk, short polling window, and composer draft limitation. Main controller fixed payload/readiness/origin/polling behavior and made the composer business input read-only so local draft text is not mistaken for submitted payload.

delegations.task_goal: Review the current App #265 diff after payload/readiness fixes and smoke coverage.
delegations.output_format: Findings ordered by severity with changed files, validation commands/results, remaining risks, and scope confirmation.
delegations.summary: Reported two High findings: submit state was not bound to task/Core endpoint, and accepted-but-not-ready runs were shown as failed. Main controller fixed both by keying submit state and submitted live run overrides by taskId plus Core endpoint, returning `polling` with runId for accepted-but-not-ready runs, adding submit/poll smoke coverage, and making the composer business input read-only to avoid draft submission ambiguity.

external_dependencies.boundary: Core now exposes terminal read-only result/evidence/session refs for accepted App tasks. This App PR consumes the contract but does not prove live site execution.

ownership_contract.task_goal: Add App-side Core read-only task submit and refs polling for APP-265.
read_scope: App submit/read clients and task thread UI
Core #248 merged PR evidence by reference only

ownership_contract.output_format: PR-ready report with changed files, validation results, PR/head metadata, and remaining live E2E blockers.
integration_target: App #14 runtime/task submit E2E closeout input

passed.evidence: No whitespace errors after App submit client, UI, smoke, and carrier changes.
Renderer and Electron TypeScript checks passed after installing dependencies with npm ci.

Build and desktop shell smoke passed. Smoke validates Core task-intent v0 payload, ready Harbor live identity gating, needs-auth rejection, same-origin task URL guard, refs-only evidence policy, absence of invalid top-level task `entrypoint`, POST /tasks submit/poll happy path, returned run/evidence/session refs projection, and accepted-but-not-ready runs staying in `polling` instead of failed.

to_refresh_after_commit: Computer Use App E2E after explicit user authorization for any real account/profile/site action

integration_evidence.summary: App constructs Core `webenvoy.task-intent.v0`, posts to `/tasks`, and polls `/runs/:id`, `/result`, `/evidence-refs`, `/failure`, and `/session-refs` through owner APIs. Accepted runs whose refs are not queryable yet remain `polling` with runId instead of being marked failed.
Submit remains disabled unless local runtime is live, Core health/admission are ready, Harbor health is ready, a read-only task spec exists, and a matching ready Harbor live identity is available.
Task URLs must match the selected identity origin; payload key scanning blocks forbidden structured fields while not treating ordinary business input strings as schema keys.
Submit state and UI-submitted Core live run overrides are keyed by taskId plus Core endpoint, preventing stale run ids from being displayed on another task or after an endpoint switch.

A successful submit injects the Core live run into the matching task/endpoint and shows submit status, run id, diagnostics, evidence refs, and session refs without raw evidence. The composer displays the selected task business input as read-only so free-form draft text is not mistaken for submitted payload.

runtime_boundary.runtime_evidence_kind: local App contract smoke and packaged owner-runtime build path
runtime_boundary.profile: none opened by this App lane

remaining_limitations: This PR does not perform real Xiaohongshu/BOSS site access or browser profile actions.
Final App #14 closeout still needs user-authorized Computer Use E2E with real provider detection, identity browser session, read-only tasks, evidence refs, and write-precheck submitted=false.
Composer free-form draft entry is intentionally out of scope; this slice displays the selected task's structured business input as read-only and submits only that task input.
